sglang.title: Add support for AutoRound quantized models
sglang.author: WeiweiZhang1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
This pr is to support models quantized by AutoRound github paper,
AutoRound delivers significantly higher accuracy at extremely low bit-widths (e.g., 2-bit) and offers broader compatibility across models (LLMs and VLMs), quantization formats, and configurations. You can check out our github/paper or

sglang.title: Optimize triton_mrope with torch compile
sglang.author: yuan-luo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

In the recent Triton mrope PR (#11722), several Torch ops introduced overhead. Despite kernel-level speedups 30%-40%, end-to-end performance regressed.

This PR optimizes triton mrope with adding torch compile. The enhancement makes E2E under triton mrope's performance exceeds the legacy

sglang.title: Fix crash after flush cache
sglang.author: cctry
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When calling /flush_cache, we should ensure the engine is completely idle with no requests living. The current checking is not complete for PD and overlap scheduler.
Typical Error
When the checking misses a request, that request might hold the tree node as last_node from the existing radi

sglang.title: [Detokenizer Manager] Cleanup state when reqs are finished
sglang.author: Muqi1029
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When a request containing an rid field is sent to the SGLang engine multiple times, the resulting output_strs includes a few trailing tokens (usually up to 5), which are meaningless.
The root cause is that after a request is completed, the DetokenizerManager still retains the state associ

sglang.title: check_offload_progress more frequently
sglang.author: pansicheng
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

When workloads are heavy and retractions occur frequently, the process_decode_queue function may skip calling check_offload_progress, causing device memory to remain unreleased. This PR ensures check_offload_progress is invoked every time process_decode_queue runs, guaranteeing prompt me

sglang.title: [Feature] PD-Multiplexing Context and Scheduler.
sglang.author: ykcombat
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR provides PD-Multiplexing scheduler and context manager. After that, we will enable cuda graph and communicator switching for PD-Multiplexing to get better performance. Subsequent PRs of PD-Multiplexing can be found  here.

Modifications

Add mixin class to provide PD-Multiplexing

sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Fixes the below failure on XPU:

TypeError: RotaryEmbedding.forward_xpu() got an unexpected keyword argument 'fused_set_kv_buffer_arg'


We added kernel for rope in sgl-project/sgl-kernel-xpu#14 (merged). Replaced forward_native with
torch.ops.sgl_kernel.rotary_embedding.

Motivation
Add support for Matryoshka embeddings to SGLang
Matryoshka embeddings help truncate embedding dim reducing embedding storage cost for EBR and similar use-cases.
Adding this support to SGLang enables fast serving for Matryoshka embeddings.

It was reverted as one of the per optimizations introduced along with CSGMV (custom triton kernel cache) broke AMD CI because the optimization depends on an internal triton interface that varies between triton versions and backends.
To unblock CSGMV rollout & to ensure co

sglang.title: Use explicit uint64 dtype for Tensor data_ptr() to avoid overflow
sglang.author: jianan-gu
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Tensor data_ptr() API returns a virtual address which should be uint64 value, this PR adds explicit dtype (torch.uint64) to avoid overflow errors  on different devices.

vllm.title: [Stability fix] turn off HMA allocator when connector is set
vllm.author: KuntaiDu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Due to #25712 , currently vLLM will hard fail if the user simply set a connector because vLM enables HMA by default.
To avoid hard fail, before discussing with @njhill to figure out a better solution, let's just turn off HMA when a connector is being set.
